specs.title: TC-79593-01 — Logo click navigates to home @homepage @navigation @smoke
TC-79593-02-negative — Search with invalid term shows 'Nothing found!' @search @negative
TC-79593-02-positive — Search returns relevant results for a valid term @search @positive @smoke
TC-79593-03 — Store Locator opens and Find All Stores link works @store-locator @navigation

steps.title: Navigate to homepage
Click page body to unblock loading
Click 'Select Your Store' / stores link in header
Wait for Store Locator URL
Verify 'Find a Store Near You' heading is visible
Click 'Find All Stores by Province' link
Wait for All Stores URL
Verify All Stores list is visible
